name: PARKER PAWN LLC
description_short: Parker Pawn LLC is a pawn shop located in Brandon, FL offering collateral-based loans and personal finance solutions.
description_long:
Parker Pawn LLC operates as a pawn shop located at 127 S Moon Ave in Brandon, Florida. The business is positioned within the collateral-lending industry, providing customers with an alternative financial service based on personal asset pledging. Founded and operating under the LLC business structure, Parker Pawn serves the Brandon metropolitan area with extended operating hours throughout the week.

Based on available information, Parker Pawn LLC functions as a traditional pawn shop, which typically offers short-term loans secured by personal collateral such as jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables. Customers can either pawn items for immediate cash or sell items outright to the establishment. The business model provides rapid access to funds without requiring credit checks or traditional lending documentation.

Parker Pawn LLC distinguishes itself through consistent weekday and weekend availability, operating 10:30 AM to 6:00 PM Monday through Friday and 10:30 AM to 4:30 PM on Saturday. The business maintains a physical storefront location with direct phone contact available at (813) 530-4624, allowing customers to inquire about specific items or loan terms before visiting. This accessibility model caters to working individuals and those seeking flexible financial solutions.

Parker Pawn LLC is best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs who possess valuable personal items they can use as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical assets, and failure to repay results in forfeiture of the pledged item. Customers should carefully evaluate whether collateral-based borrowing aligns with their financial situation, as this approach differs fundamentally from unsecured lending and involves the risk of permanent loss of personal property.
pros: Physical storefront location in Brandon with verifiable address and direct phone contact
Extended weekday hours (10:30 AM - 6:00 PM) accommodate working professionals
No credit check requirement typical of pawn lending
Saturday availability (10:30 AM - 4:30 PM) provides weekend access
Immediate cash funding without lengthy application processes
Established business presence with phone accessibility for pre-visit inquiries
cons: Limited operating hours on Saturday (closes at 4:30 PM vs. 6:00 PM weekdays) may inconvenience some customers
Requires surrendering personal property as collateral, creating asset loss risk if loan is not repaid
No website or online presence beyond Waze listing limits ability to research services, terms, or interest rates in advance
Website data does not disclose loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures
Closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend-focused customers
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral items
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional unsecured loans
Those seeking quick short-term financing without credit bureau inquiries
diagnosis: Parker Pawn LLC is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items and cannot qualify for traditional credit-based loans. The main caveat is that pawn lending requires surrendering physical assets as collateral, and customers risk permanent loss of these items if unable to repay the loan—this is a fundamentally different financial product from credit-based lending.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
